ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "train_approach" TEXT /* Approach used for training (e.g., RESAMPLE_150_25_25) */,
  "train_info" INTEGER /* Information about the training process (e.g., number of epochs) */,
  "test_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this result belongs to */,
  "classifier" TEXT /* Classifier used for training (e.g., KNN, DT, RF) */,
  "train_changes" INTEGER /* Number of changes made during training */,
  "train_bug_per" REAL /* Percentage of bugs found in training */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric of the classifier */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric of the classifier */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the classifier */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the classifier */,
  "gm" REAL /* Geometric mean of precision and recall */,
  "d2h" REAL /* Days to hours conversion for the model */,
  "ifa" INTEGER /* Information fidelity average */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "brier" REAL /* Brier score of the model */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was tested */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature selection record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this feature selection belongs to */,
  "features_selected" TEXT /* List of selected features used in the training (e.g., $ld$entropy$la$age$lt$exp$Buggy) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the selected features */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature selection was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature selection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this change belongs to */,
  "train_changes" INTEGER /* Number of changes made during training */,
  "test_changes" INTEGER /* Number of changes made during testing */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team lead, data scientist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
